user.title: Singapore
user.description: Set up the Singapore integration. Public data sources (tariffs, COE, weather, trains, holidays) are enabled immediately. To add household electricity and water usage, open the integration's **Configure** dialog after setup.

otp.title: SP Services Two-Factor Authentication
otp.description: An OTP has been sent to the mobile number registered for **{username}**. Enter it below to complete login.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SP Services
reauth_confirm.description: Your SP Services session for **{username}** has expired. Select **Yes** to re-enter your credentials and receive a new OTP, or **No** to attempt a reload with the existing session.

data.reauth_confirm: Yes, I want to re-enter my SP Services credentials

error.name_too_long: Name must be 64 characters or fewer.
error.credentials_incomplete: Please provide both a username and a password, or leave both blank.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid SP Services username or password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to SP Services. Check your network and try again.

init.title: SP Services Household Usage
init.description: Enter your SP Services credentials to enable household electricity and water usage sensors. Leave both fields blank to remove SP Services and disable those sensors.

otp.title: SP Services Two-Factor Authentication
otp.description: An OTP has been sent to the mobile number registered for **{username}**. Enter it below to complete login.
